queEsAthx.pageTitle: What is ATHX: athlete guide for 2026
queEsAthx.pageDescription: ATHX is ATHLEX's fitness competition. Learn what ATHX is, the 3 events (Strength, Endurance, MetCon X), ATHX and ATHX PRO categories, and how to prepare for ATHX 2026 with official programming.
queEsAthx.ogTitle: What is ATHX: athlete guide for 2026
queEsAthx.ogDescription: What ATHX is, competition format, categories, and how to prepare.
queEsAthx.title: What is ATHX and how to prepare for ATHX 2026
queEsAthx.intro: ATHX is ATHLEX's fitness competition. This guide explains the format, categories (ATHX and ATHX PRO), and how to build an ATHX programming plan that gets you to the podium.

format.title: The ATHX format
format.body: ATHX combines three blocks: Strength, Endurance, and MetCon X. Each block measures a different capacity and is scored independently. The winner is who performs most balanced across all three.

programming.title: What serious ATHX programming looks like
programming.body1: Well-designed ATHX programming periodizes into 4 phases: BASE, BUILD, PEAK, and DELOAD. Load increases progressively by RPE and % 1RM, with unload weeks to arrive fresh at competition.
programming.body2: ATHX training must include the year's movements from week 1 — if you arrive at competition with questionable technique, you won't compensate with volume.

q1.question: What is ATHX?
q1.answer: ATHX is the fitness competition organized by ATHLEX. It brings together strength tests, endurance events, and mixed competitions (MetCon X) in a 3-day format. It's open to athletes from Spain and Latin America.

q2.question: What are the ATHX events?
q2.answer: ATHX is divided into three blocks: Strength (max strength), Endurance (endurance), and MetCon X (mixed events with weighted and gymnastics movements). The cycle culminates in a simulation of all 3 blocks.

q3.question: Difference between ATHX and ATHX PRO?
q3.answer: ATHX is the open category. ATHX PRO increases volume and intensity for competitive athletes: longer sessions, higher loads, and stricter movement standards.

q4.question: How do I prepare for ATHX?
q4.answer: With sport-specific ATHX programming: periodization in BASE, BUILD, PEAK, and DELOAD, calibrated by RPE and % 1RM. ATHLEX Training delivers a weekly plan Monday through Sunday, warm-up, strength and MetCon each day, plus direct chat with coach.

q5.question: When is ATHX 2026?
q5.answer: Official ATHX 2026 dates are announced on ATHLEX's official channel. Our programming is aligned to the competition calendar.

cta.title: Start today
cta.body: ATHLEX Training delivers official ATHX programming with weekly plan, tracking, and direct chat with coach. First week free.

responsible.title: 1. Controller of data processing
responsible.body: The controller of data processing is ATHLEX Training ("we"). For any questions related to this policy you can write to soporte@athlextraining.com.

dataCollected.title: 2. Data we collect
dataCollected.itemProfile: Sports profile data: age, weight, sex, category, profile photos, and optional strength maxes.
dataCollected.itemSubscription: Subscription data: customer identifiers and payment status managed by Stripe.
dataCollected.itemTechnical: Technical data: IP address, browser, operating system, and basic logs.

purposes.title: 3. Purposes
purposes.itemTraining: Provide you with training service and personalize plans.
purposes.itemManage: Manage authentication (email or Google), subscription, and support.
purposes.itemCommunicate: Send operational communications (confirmations, support notices, subscription changes).

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal basis
legalBasis.body: We process your data to execute the contract (access to the service), comply with legal obligations (billing), and with your consent when applicable (e.g., Google sign-in).

providers.title: 5. Providers that process your data
providers.itemSupabase: Supabase — authentication, database, and avatar storage.
providers.itemGoogle: Google — sign-in (if you choose that option).
providers.footer: These providers act as data processors and apply their own security and compliance guarantees.

retention.title: 6. Retention
retention.body: We retain your data while you maintain an active account. When you delete your account, we delete your profile within a maximum of 30 days, except for data required by law to retain (billing, tax).

rights.title: 7. Your rights
rights.body: You can exercise your rights to access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction, and portability by writing to soporte@athlextraining.com. You can also lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (in Spain, the AEPD (Spanish DPA)).

cookies.title: 8. Cookies
cookies.body: We use technical cookies necessary to maintain your login session. We do not use advertising or third-party analytics cookies.

changes.title: 9. Changes
changes.body: We may update this policy. If there are material changes, we will notify you by email or from the app.

whoWeAre.title: 1. Who we are
whoWeAre.body: ATHLEX Training ("the service", "we") is an online training platform. Contact: soporte@athlextraining.com.

acceptance.title: 2. Acceptance
acceptance.bodyPrefix: By creating an account or subscribing, you accept these terms and our
acceptance.bodySuffix: . If you do not agree, do not use the service.

minimumAge.title: 3. Minimum age
minimumAge.body: You must be at least 14 years old to use the service. If you are under 18, you need consent from your parent, guardian, or legal representative.

subscriptionPayment.title: 4. Subscription and payment
subscriptionPayment.item1: Access to full content requires an active subscription, managed through Stripe.
subscriptionPayment.item2: Billing occurs on a recurring basis according to your chosen plan.
subscriptionPayment.item3: You can cancel at any time from your profile. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your paid period.
subscriptionPayment.item4: Prorated refunds for partially used periods are not provided, except as required by law.

contentUsage.title: 5. Content usage
contentUsage.body: Content (routines, methods, texts, images, videos) is owned by ATHLEX Training. We grant you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable license for your individual use. Redistribution, republishing, or commercial use without authorization is prohibited.

trainingRisks.title: 6. Physical training risks
trainingRisks.body: Physical training carries inherent risks. Consult a doctor before starting any program if you have pre-existing medical conditions, are pregnant, or are recovering from an injury. We are not liable for injuries resulting from content use; you assume all risk and responsibility.

userConduct.title: 7. User conduct
userConduct.body: You agree not to share your account, attempt to access other accounts, reverse-engineer the service, or upload illegal, offensive, or third-party infringing content.

suspensionCancellation.title: 8. Suspension and cancellation
suspensionCancellation.body: We may suspend or cancel your account if you breach these terms, if we detect fraudulent activity, or if you stop paying your subscription.

availability.title: 9. Availability
availability.body: We make reasonable efforts to keep the service available, but we do not guarantee 100% uptime. We may perform routine maintenance.

limitationLiability.title: 10. Limitation of liability
limitationLiability.body: The service is provided "as is". To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect damages, lost profits, or data loss resulting from service use.

termsChanges.title: 11. Changes to terms
termsChanges.body: We may update these terms. We will notify you of material changes with reasonable advance notice. Continued use after notification constitutes your acceptance.

applicableLaw.title: 12. Applicable law
applicableLaw.body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any disputes, the courts of your domicile as a consumer have jurisdiction.

q1.question: Do I need prior experience?
q1.answer: Yes, prior knowledge is recommended. The program assumes mastery of the movements included this year.

q2.question: What equipment do I need?
q2.answer: Standard box: Olympic barbell, dumbbells, sandbag, box jump, ski-erg, or rowing machine.

q4.question: What's the difference between ATHX and ATHX PRO?
q4.answer: PRO has higher work capacity and workouts tend to run a bit longer.

q5.question: How do I cancel?
q5.answer: From your profile, one click. Cancel anytime. You keep access until the end of your paid period.
